title: Validation Sovereignty
description: Validation sovereignty means deciding Bitcoin's rules by verifying them yourself instead of outsourcing validation to a wallet provider, service, or remote node. It is the practical user-facing consequence of don't trust, verify.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Philosophy: Don’t trust, verify
resources.notes: Explains why self-verification matters and what is lost when you delegate it.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Philosophy: Trustlessness
resources.notes: Frames validation as the practical way to use Bitcoin without trusting third parties.

resources.title: Bitcoin Development Philosophy
resources.notes: Directly aligned with the philosophy and engineering tradeoffs behind self-validation.
